text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  2 09:41:49 2014
New Revision: 352790
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352790
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352790/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Use single space after WWW:
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189167
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-File-Inplace/Makefile
  head/textproc/p5-File-Inplace/pkg-descr

Modified: head/textproc/p5-File-Inplace/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-File-Inplace/Makefile	Fri May  2 09:41:44 2014	(r352789)
+++ head/textproc/p5-File-Inplace/Makefile	Fri May  2 09:41:49 2014	(r352790)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl module for in-place editing of files
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 

Modified: head/textproc/p5-File-Inplace/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-File-Inplace/pkg-descr	Fri May  2 09:41:44 2014	(r352789)
+++ head/textproc/p5-File-Inplace/pkg-descr	Fri May  2 09:41:49 2014	(r352790)
@@ -9,4 +9,4 @@ It also offers functionality such as bac
 field splitting per-line, automatic chomping/unchomping, and aborting
 edits partially through without affecting the original file.
 
-WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/File-Inplace/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/File-Inplace/
